name: Enso
description: Brush-drawn circles on washi, each left open where the stroke lifted — every redraw re-inks the ring and turns its opening.

code.style: --sumi: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --rule: ( /* the opening is a paper-colored block swung around the ring by its origin */ @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(10%, 20%); border: calc(72px / @Y) solid var(--sumi); border-radius: @rand(46%, 53%) @rand(47%, 54%) @rand(46%, 52%) @rand(48%, 54%); opacity: @rand(0.8, 1); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 41%; top: -2%; width: 18%; height: 22%; background: var(--color0); transform-origin: 50% calc(50% + 240%); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
